name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin)
benefit: ₹1,20,000 for house construction in plains, ₹1,30,000 in hilly areas + toilet grant of ₹12,000
benefit_hindi: Ghar banane ke liye ₹1,20,000 (plains mein), ₹1,30,000 (pahadi area mein) + toilet ke liye ₹12,000 alag se

eligibility.description: Homeless families or those living in kaccha/dilapidated houses in rural areas
eligibility.description_hindi: Gaon mein begharon ya kacche ghar mein rehne walon ke liye
criteria: Must be houseless or living in kaccha/zero-room house
Must be in SECC 2011 Awas list
Priority: SC/ST, minorities, freed bonded laborers
exclusions: Families who already received housing assistance

documents_required: Land ownership proof or allotment letter

steps: Check name in SECC Awas list at your Gram Panchayat
Gram Sabha verifies and approves beneficiary list
Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block office
Amount released in 3 installments after each stage inspection
House must be completed within 12 months
steps_hindi: Gram Panchayat mein SECC Awas list mein apna naam check karein
Gram Panchayat ya Block office mein apply karein
Paisa 3 installment mein aayega — ghar banne ke har stage par

hindi_summary: PM Awas Yojana mein garib parivaar ko ghar banane ke liye 1 lakh 20 hazaar rupaye milte hain. Pahadi area mein 1 lakh 30 hazaar milte hain. Toilet ke liye 12 hazaar alag se milte hain. Gram Panchayat mein jaake apply karein. SECC list mein naam hona chahiye.
